steps.title: Identify the sides relative to angle X
steps.content:
The right angle is at Z (marked by the small square). For angle X:
  • Opposite side: YZ = 222
  • Adjacent side: ZX = 296

steps.title: Apply tangent ratio and simplify
steps.content:
$$\tan(X) = \frac{\text{opposite}}{\text{adjacent}} = \frac{222}{296}$$
Both 222 and 296 are even, so divide by 2:
$$\frac{222}{296} = \frac{111}{148}$$
Both 111 and 148 are divisible by 37:
$$\frac{111}{148} = \frac{3}{4}$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
